Disneyland Resort MARCH 2023 TIPS! This month comes with a new set of attractions, experiences, and ride closures: 🥨 DISNEY CALIFORNIA ADVENTURE FOOD & WINE FESTIVAL – Runs March 3 - April 25, 2023! See live entertainment around the park while you enjoy dozens of snacks and drinks at the marketplace kiosks. No extra ticket needed for this event but food is an additional cost. You can also purchase a Sip & Savor Pass with 8 tabs to redeem for snacks and non-alcoholic drinks (pricing coming soon). ✈️ SOARIN’ OVER CALIFORNIA – Also see the original version of the ride starting March 3 - April 25, 2023! Soarin’ Over the World will return after. 🪄 MAGIC HAPPENS PARADE – See it daily at 3:30PM & 6:30PM at Disneyland Park. However, due to Princess Nite on March 7 & 9, the parade will run at 1:30PM & 3:30PM on those dates. Disneyland Park will close at 8pm on March 7 & 9 for Princess Nite; tickets are sold out for this special event. Disney California Adventure will remain open until 10pm on those dates. MICKEY’S TOONTOWN – Reopens on March 19! The date was pushed back due to heavier-than-usual storms in Southern California. Part of the land is accessible near the entrance to Mickey & Minnie’s Runaway Railway. DISNEYLAND ROPE DROP TIP – I would still rope drop Star Wars: Rise of the Resistance and then head over to Mickey & Minnie’s Runaway Railway. On average, Rise still has a much longer wait time throughout the day than Runaway Railway #disneyland #disneylandresort #disneycaliforniaadventure #disney

Well I set out to break my record for the largest bowl I have ever turned. Currently that’s sitting at 24”. This blank started off at 27.5” which I thought would give me plenty of grace just in case something went wrong…. From the start, this piece of oak was filled with unseen cracks and voids causing me to turn more away than I had initially planned. The finished piece came in a 1/2” smaller than my record at 23.5”…. I didn’t beat my record but I had fun trying & of course I will be trying again soon! Full video of the process on YouTube for those of you who are interested! #woodturning #woodtok #woodturnersoftiktok #bowlturning #woodturner #artistsoftiktok #woodworking

Since we start spring ball in 3 weeks, we mixed in French Contrast Training this week.  This is a sample of a French Contrast Upper Body workout.  1. Eccentric Bench at 70% for 4 x 4 with 5 second tempo 2. Band Assisted Push Up 4 x 5 3. Explosive Push Up 4 x 5 4.
